# iosxe_privilege (Data Source)

This data source can read the Privilege configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_privilege" "example" {
  name  = "exec"
  level = 7
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `level` (Number)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `commands` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--commands))
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.

<a id="nestedatt--commands"></a>
### Nested Schema for `commands`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) There are side effects
